CONTACT

  •  

     

    JobberTechnology.com

     

    We provide vetted technology solutions for your auto parts store.

     

     

     

  • 2023 Announcement

    Signature capture options (In-Store and Delivery)

     

    The Contract with Conduent will end at the end of March 2023. This change gives you the perfect opportunity to evaluate and choose one of the options below. Each offers your business efficiencies and savings by eliminating manual document management processes while providing your customers the convenience of electronically signed invoices and statements that they have come to expect.

     

    Take a moment to review the options below so you are well informed and ready to act on the right solution for your document management needs.

    Option 1

    ​The new store systems app + In-store Signature Capture Pad

     

    Store systems app is the new mobile app. If you are one of the 900+ stores that need a solution to replace OnBase you are immediately eligible to begin using this app.

    Cost 

    • Store systems app is available at no charge
    • $99 - $199 per Topaz signature pad
    • Costs associated with mobile devices and data plans- See Current Offers
    • Accessories for your tablets. See Amazon links- Case Docking Station

    Option 2

    Delivery Tracker + In-store Signature Capture Pad

     

    Delivery Tracker is a robust end-to-end delivery platform that includes route planning, dispatch, tracking, communication, and analytics.

     

    Cost

    • $115/month per store subscription
    • $99 - $199 per Topaz signature pad
    • Costs associated with mobile devices and data plans. See Current Offers
    • Accessories for your tablets. See Amazon links- Case Docking Station

     

     

    Option 3

    You can reach out to Conduent directly to sign up for document imaging.

     

    Option 4

    Independent ownerships can continue using paper invoices.

     

     

  • Store Phone Systems

    Desingned by Jobbers for Jobbers. Choose self-install or let our team assist. Visit our phone page for more information.

    Learn More

    Tablets

    Bring your own tablets for Delivery Tracker or the New Store Systems App. See our current offers.

    Learn More

    Background Checks

    Exclusive pricing for pre-employment background checks, drug screening, driving records, and credit checks.

    Learn More

    Professional Company Email Address

    Stop using yahoo, Gmail, AOL for your company's email. Start using a professional email address. Office 365 plans start at $12 a user. We can have you up and running in less than an hour.

    Get Started

    Primary and Backup Internet

    Poor internet connections can cost your business hundreds of dollars an hour. We can help source local internet options to fit all budgets.

    Get Started

  • About Us

     

    This website was created solely for NAPA jobbers, shop owners, and their employees to have one place where they can go to have all their questions answered from store procedures, accounting, TAMS, sales initiatives, to what products should they purchase to improve their operation. All of this is designed to allow the jobber and their employees immediate access to professional expertise where they can get any and all of their questions answered in a fast and professional manner.

    This jobber training group has been assembled from several individual business owners that have been working with NAPA owners for decades. This same group of business professionals have worked together to solve problems for NAPA jobbers and together have consulted with thousands of NAPA stores. As a group, they have conducted
    32 Advanced Store Training Meetings for NAPA jobbers all over the country.
